notes: userId is required by the input schema; cases use '' so the flow treats the caller as anonymous (skips Firestore rate-limit + profile fetch) and skips library persistence. activities[].phase is an English enum (Engage/Explore/...) by design — never script-check it. assessment/homework/keyVocabulary are nullable-optional: skip script check when absent. Identical inputs may be served from the lesson-plan cache. Long-running: main generation plus a secondary materials-audit AI call (expect 20-60s).
